live_performance.annualized_caveat: Extrapolation from <90 days is statistically meaningless. Wait for sample size n_trades_closed >= 10.

backtest_reference.haircut_method: DSR Bailey-de Prado + Bonferroni K=25 + régime drift discount

drift.interpretation: Forward paper started 2026-04-26. Need >=12 weeks AND >=10 closed trades for first review on 2026-07-19.
